title: A Bunch of Unecessary Things
description: fun mod of decoration, tools, armors in modern style
body:
**The first rule of this mod is: don’t ask questions about logic in this mod**

A fun mod focused on adding animated tools, decorations, defensive blocks, and armor based on both popular and lesser-known resources:
- tin
- copper
- lead
- bronze
- fluorite
- uranium
- steel
- arcane stone (from forbidden & arcanus)

**(The mod doesn't add any ores; it only adds their usage)**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YPc8gTGs9rU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

- You can use a fuel dispenser to refuel drills and saws with coal or coal blocks
- The charger will only work with exoskeleton chestplate, shockers, mecha batteries, and plasma cutters
- When used with the right mouse button, the battery will transfer its entire energy to the exoskeleton, regardless of any limits.
- A steel mine can be reloaded with gunpowder after detonation
- Explosive and uranium barrels are sensitive to projectiles
- The exoskeleton will only function if all parts are equipped, even if they come from different resources; otherwise, or if the exoskeleton is out of power, you will not receive any beneficial effects and your movement will be slowed.
- The nuclear fungal generator will be a little easier to craft with the “spore:fungal infection” mod

![atomic fungal generator place example](https://i.ibb.co/5xsggDwr/2026-04-20-00-52-32.png)

- The nuclear mushroom will draw power from the heavy uranium columns located one block away from it and receive an energy production bonus for each of its four sides.
- It's important that the column be at least three blocks high; if you place another fungal generator directly above or below the previous one, they won't work.
- The generator won't passively transfer electricity; a special configuration is required (not tested with other mods)

![mekanism wire example](https://i.ibb.co/dJ0g64PN/2026-04-20-00-52-46.png)

- For aesthetic and practical reasons, the generator unit can be combined with a uranium tank:

![column example](https://i.ibb.co/JwYwVqW7/2026-04-20-00-53-32.png)

FAG:

Where are the shovels? Why aren't they here?

-  Someone stole it

What about the hoes?

- them too

Can I suggest a resource and/or mod so they can be added to this mod?

- Yes, but the implementation timeline will most likely be very long

There's a lot of radioactive stuff in fashion, but no actual radiation

- The radiation system is planned for the future


[Author telegram channel](https://t.me/Nebularity)

[or digital arts creativity](https://www.deviantart.com/elliemore-casp)
